study_scheme:
Community Health Practice Community Health Practice Applicable to students admitted in 2023-24
Major Programme Requirement (for
Associate Degree or Higher Diploma holders admitted to senior-year places)
Students
are required to complete a minimum of 52 units of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Required
Courses:
(a)  |  Biostatistics and Epidemiology
courses  |  6
(i) 1 course from CHPR3115,
PHPC2015#
(ii) 1 course from CHPR3117,
PHPC2017#
(b)  |  Community Health Practice courses  |  40
CHPR3001, 3002, 3008, 4001, 4002,
4003, 4004, 4005, 4008, 4901[a], 4902[a], GRON3211#, PHPC1001#, 1012#, 1017#
2.  |  Elective
Courses:
6 units of
courses chosen from the following, with a maximum of 1 course from Group
B: Group A: CHPR4011, 4012, PHPC2007#,
2009#, 2020#, 3010#, 3018#,
3034#, 3415#,
4032#, 4033#, 4040#, 4041#, 4042#, 4043# Group B: ANTH4330#, GPAD3255#, SOCI3227#,
SPED2540#, 4560#, 4570#  |  6
Total:  |  52
Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  CHPR courses at 2000 and above level as well as those labeled as # will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification.
[a]  |  Capstone courses
Recommended Course Pattern  |  Units
